violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. State guidance provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. retail shelving 2. interior and exterior of all refrigeration units New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The floors in the retail area and in the back storage area, and the walls by water fountains have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Several ceiling tiles in the facility were observed in poor repair (water damage). New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2025
Floor tiles in the back storage room is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025
Litter observed around exterior of building. Area to be cleaned and maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
